ddls:
CREATE TABLE "growth_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth chart */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the baby (e.g., PRE NB, 3M, 6M) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the baby (e.g., 17-18.5", 18.5-20") */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the baby (e.g., 5-7lbs, 7-9lbs) */,
  "chest_circumference" TEXT /* Chest circumference of the baby (e.g., 14", 15.5") */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the growth chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the growth chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_charts_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 0-3M, 3-6M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "babies" (
  "baby_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baby */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the baby */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the baby */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the baby's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the baby's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baby_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_babies_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the parent (e.g., mother, father) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parent's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parent's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "baby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby the record belongs to */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth chart the record belongs to */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the baby at the time of measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the baby at the time of measurement */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the baby at the time of measurement */,
  "chest_circumference" TEXT /* Chest circumference of the baby at the time of measurement */,
  "measurement_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit used for the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the growth record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the growth record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES growth_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_measurement_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_baby_id FOREIGN KEY ("baby_id") REFERENCES babies ("baby_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "baby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., sitting, crawling) */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was achieved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the milestone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_baby_id FOREIGN KEY ("baby_id") REFERENCES babies ("baby_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "baby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., nutrition, sleep) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was issued */,
  "recommendation_category" TEXT /* Category of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_baby_id FOREIGN KEY ("baby_id") REFERENCES babies ("baby_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pediatrician, nurse, parent) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., lbs, kg) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the wearable device (e.g., Fitbit, Apple Watch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wearable device */,
  "device_token" TEXT /* Unique token for the wearable device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wearable device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wearable device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device data entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wearable device the data belongs to */,
  "baby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baby the data belongs to */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the baby at the time of measurement */,
  "step_count" INTEGER /* Step count of the baby at the time of measurement */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Category of the device data (e.g., heart rate, step count) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_baby_id FOREIGN KEY ("baby_id") REFERENCES babies ("baby_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES wearable_devices ("device_id")
)
